prompt: Which statement best reflects professional practice in this competency area?

options.text: Apply recognized standards, document decisions, and seek proportionate solutions aligned with client objectives.
Ignore applicable codes and rely on informal practice only.
Defer all professional judgment to unqualified subcontractors without review.
Avoid record-keeping because it slows delivery.

explanation: Correct: Apply recognized standards, document decisions, and seek proportionate solutions aligned with client objectives. This aligns with Foundations of Risk Management for this readiness check.

distractorExplanations.b: Incorrect. This does not reflect best practice for Foundations of Risk Management.
distractorExplanations.c: Incorrect. This does not reflect best practice for Foundations of Risk Management.
distractorExplanations.d: Incorrect. This does not reflect best practice for Foundations of Risk Management.

sourceNote: Minimal preview bank — Foundations of Risk Management (10 questions per topic seed).
